criteria.text: The page includes a viewport meta tag for mobile responsiveness.
criteria.static_expectation: correct — answer is fully in source, grounding adds nothing

criteria.text: The primary CTA uses action-oriented copy, not a generic label like 'Submit' or 'Click here'.
criteria.evidence_needed: read and judge the CTA wording
criteria.playwright_check: none — rendering does not help judge phrasing
criteria.static_expectation: correct — pure semantic, the LLM's home turf

criteria.text: The headline clearly states a single value proposition and contains no placeholder text.
criteria.evidence_needed: read and judge the headline meaning
criteria.playwright_check: none — rendering does not help judge clarity

criteria.text: Testimonial / trust content is actually VISIBLE to a normal visitor (present in DOM is not enough).
criteria.evidence_needed: understand it is testimonial/trust content AND confirm rendered visibility
criteria.playwright_check: computed style display/visibility, bounding box > 0, element in viewport flow
criteria.static_expectation: FALSE-PASS — source shows the content present, judge says PASS, but it is display:none / visibility:hidden
criteria.gap_expectation: large — grounded packet should catch what static misses

criteria.text: Any claim that content is 'shown / comparable / verifiable below' is actually backed by corresponding fields in the DOM.
criteria.evidence_needed: read the copy's promise AND verify the DOM actually delivers it
criteria.playwright_check: presence and population of the promised section/fields after render
criteria.static_expectation: FALSE-PASS — judge trusts the copy claim, but the backing fields are missing

criteria.text: The primary CTA is actually visible in the mobile first-screen viewport, not obscured.
criteria.evidence_needed: understand it is the primary CTA AND confirm its rendered position in the mobile viewport
criteria.playwright_check: bounding box vs mobile viewport, not covered by sticky/overlay elements
criteria.static_expectation: FALSE-PASS — source has the CTA above fold, judge says PASS, but mobile render hides it behind a sticky header
